overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a nighttime walk through rainy castle grounds, starting at the main courtyard with a central fountain, passing through a stone archway into the North Hogwarts Region, and continuing along winding paths and across stone bridges.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the main castle gate through the rainy courtyard

entered.detail: large stone Gothic archway with portcullis and glowing lanterns
circular stone fountain with water feature in courtyard center
lit stone lanterns on pillars flanking the path
lit stone lanterns on pillars flanking the path
tall stone towers with red banners visible in background

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rainy night in a cobblestone courtyard, facing a large Gothic archway entrance to the castle. A central fountain sits in the middle of the approach, illuminated by warm lantern light against the cool blue rain.

events.description: turns left to navigate around the central fountain
enters the covered stone archway tunnel

agents.ego_description: circling the fountain and approaching the main gate archway to enter the tunnel

entered.detail: stone seating along the courtyard perimeter
wall-mounted lanterns inside the tunnel archway

segments.scene_description: Moving around the fountain, the camera approaches the imposing stone archway. The environment transitions from open courtyard to the sheltered tunnel entrance, with the archway structure now dominating the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: North Hogwarts Region stone bridge and cliffside path

events.description: exits archway onto exterior stone bridge with region text overlay appearing
path curves right along the cliffside with rain visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding stone path through the rainy landscape beyond the castle walls

entered.detail: stone walls and railings lining the path
stone walls and railings lining the path
lantern posts along the winding path

segments.scene_description: Exiting the archway reveals the North Hogwarts Region, a misty stone bridge and path winding along cliff faces. The castle gate recedes into the background as the path curves through the rainy, lantern-lit landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: ornate stone bridge with gargoyle statues

events.description: approaches ornate bridge with gargoyle statues holding lanterns

agents.ego_description: crossing the final stone bridge flanked by gargoyle statues holding glowing lanterns

entered.detail: ornate stone bridge with decorative pillars
stone gargoyle figures holding lit lanterns on bridge pillars
stone gargoyle figures holding lit lanterns on bridge pillars

segments.scene_description: The path leads to an ornate stone bridge guarded by gargoyle statues holding lanterns. The camera crosses this final bridge, with the gargoyle pillars passing by on either side, concluding the journey through the rainy castle grounds.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered castle courtyard out into the misty, rain-swept highlands of the North Hogwarts Region. It begins in a cobblestone courtyard on a rainy night, where warm lantern light glows against the cool blue tones of a central fountain. As the camera moves around the fountain, the open space narrows and the environment transitions into the sheltered confines of an imposing Gothic stone archway. The scene then expands as the camera exits the tunnel, revealing a winding stone bridge and cliffside paths shrouded in mist. Finally, the castle gate recedes into the background while the path curves further into the rainy, lantern-lit landscape.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a rainy castle perimeter that culminates in a transition over a guarded stone bridge. It begins by following a wet path that leads toward an ornate bridge, where the atmosphere is heavy with rain. As the camera advances, it passes between towering gargoyle statues holding glowing lanterns that flank the entrance. The scene then shifts as the camera crosses the bridge, moving past the stone pillars until the journey through the castle grounds finally concludes.
